expectations.text: A verification report file was written (under reviews/ or the outputs dir) that scores the lesson against all 7 standards with an explicit per-standard verdict.
expectations.evidence: verification-report.md scores all 7: Factual accuracy ('all correct' / 'accurate; one soft area'), plus '## Quality-standard scan (Academy's seven bars)' with Depth/Dual-provider/Interactivity/Tables/Role alignment/Clarity verdicts. Verdicts are spread across sections rather than one table, but each standard gets an explicit verdict.

expectations.text: The review reaches a clear ship/no-ship recommendation for the lesson.
expectations.evidence: '**Verdict:** Ship it. No blocking issues.' and '## Recommendation: Good to ship as-is.'

expectations.text: Because this lesson is the Academy's exemplar, the review does NOT raise any fabricated Blocker or Major finding; it recognizes the content as strong.
expectations.evidence: 'No blocking issues. One optional polish note.' and 'Everything factual on the Anthropic side is correct and unusually precise.' No Blocker/Major raised.

expectations.text: Any findings raised are genuinely Minor/Polish and are backed by a specific file:line reference rather than a vague opinion.
expectations.evidence: Only finding is the 'Soft area (L79, L111)' version-drift note, explicitly labeled 'not a defect', with line refs L79/L111.

expectations.text: The mechanical checks.py script was run as part of the pass.
expectations.evidence: No 'Mechanical pass'/checks.py section anywhere. Method lists 'Ran `npx tsc --noEmit` — exit 0' and manual animation-dispatch checks, but the mechanical checks.py script is never invoked or shown.

expectations.text: No content file under content/modules/ was edited (the skill is report-only unless asked to fix).
expectations.evidence: Harness git check confirms eval-0 target untouched. Chat summary: 'No changes required before commit.' Report-only.

expectations.text: A concise chat summary was produced in addition to the full report file.
